Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Continued To May-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Fred R. Brinkop, Esq. appeared for plaintiff SelectQuote Insurance Services.
No appearance by defendant Richard Lovett.
Default entered against defendant on January 4, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, March 20, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff SELECTQUOTE INSURANCE SERVICES, and against the Defaulted Defendant RICHARD LOVETT as follows:

Damages/Principal - $86,400.00.
Attorney's Fees - $11,000.00.
Costs $837.35, for a total of $98,237.35.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
